questions.question: What are the three evaluation layers the lesson names?
options: Static benchmarks, custom offline evals, online production evals
questions.explanation: Static (SWE-bench, GAIA), custom offline (LLM-judge, exec, trajectory), online (replays, alerts, cost/latency).
questions.question_zh: 本课命名的三层评测是什么？
options_zh: 静态 benchmark、定制离线 eval、在线生产 eval
questions.explanation_zh: 静态（SWE-bench、GAIA）、定制离线（LLM-judge、execution、轨迹）、在线（回放、告警、成本/延迟）。

questions.question: What is Anthropic's recommended starting point?
options: Start with simple prompts, optimize them with comprehensive evaluation, and add multi-step agentic systems only when needed
Start with a frontier model only
questions.explanation: Anthropic explicitly says evaluation is the outer loop that drives every other choice.
questions.question_zh: Anthropic 推荐的起点是什么？
options_zh: 从多 agent debate 起步
从简单 prompt 起步，用全面的评测把它优化到位，仅在需要时再引入多步 agent 系统
questions.explanation_zh: Anthropic 明确说：评测是驱动其他一切选择的外层循环。

questions.question: What is the evaluator-optimizer tight loop?
options: Proposer generates output, evaluator judges, refine until evaluator passes (Self-Refine generalized)
questions.explanation: It is Self-Refine generalized: any flow can wrap in propose-judge-refine.
options_zh: Proposer 生成输出，evaluator 打分，反复打磨直到 evaluator 通过（Self-Refine 的泛化）
questions.explanation_zh: 这是 Self-Refine 的泛化：任何流程都能套上 propose-judge-refine。

questions.question: What is the 2026 best practice for where evals live?
options: In a separate vendor dashboard only
Next to code, run in CI on every PR, gate merges on eval scores
Owned exclusively by the QA team
questions.explanation: Co-located with code, CI-gated, regression-tracked is the standard.
questions.question_zh: 2026 年 eval 应该放在哪里的最佳实践是什么？
options_zh: 只放在另一家供应商的面板里
和代码放在一起，每个 PR 都在 CI 上跑，并把 eval 分数作为 merge 门
完全交给 QA 团队
questions.explanation_zh: 和代码同居、CI 卡门、回归追踪是标准做法。

questions.question: Why does the lesson warn against an LLM-judge without grounding?
options: Judges hallucinate too; pair with the CRITIC pattern so judgment grounds on external tools
questions.explanation: CRITIC (Lesson 5) applies: tool-grounded verification keeps the judge honest.
questions.question_zh: 为什么本课对没有 grounding 的 LLM-judge 提出警告？
options_zh: Judge 本身也会幻觉；要配合 CRITIC 模式，让评判 ground 在外部工具上
questions.explanation_zh: CRITIC（第 5 课）同样适用：基于工具 grounding 的核实让 judge 保持诚实。

questions.question: What is the danger of over-fitting to evals?
options: Optimizing for the eval set diverges from production usefulness; rotate cases
questions.explanation: Eval set rotation keeps the optimization aligned with production reality.
questions.question_zh: 过度拟合 eval 的危险是什么？
options_zh: 为 eval 集做优化会偏离生产可用性；要轮换 case
questions.explanation_zh: Eval 集轮换让优化与生产现实保持一致。

questions.question: Why do flaky evals cause problems?
options: Non-deterministic cases produce false alarms; pin seeds and snapshot state
questions.explanation: Flake makes regressions unreadable; determinism (seeds, state snapshots) is required.
questions.question_zh: 为什么 flaky eval 会带来问题？
options_zh: 非确定性 case 会触发误报；要钉死随机种子并快照状态
questions.explanation_zh: Flake 让回归不可读；确定性（种子、状态快照）是必需的。
